prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the review of careers guidance in specialist settings, specifically outlined by the Department for Education (DfE), which operates in England. The focus on special schools and independent specialist colleges indicates that it is relevant to the educational framework within England.
